map_npcs.name: Rival Cade
map_npcs.post_combat_dialogue:
***CRASH, BOOM***
Oh, *look what you've done now!*
The tunnel's caved in and it's all your fault!
Help me look for a way out of here!
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue:
Oh, I bet you think you're really showing off to the higher ups, don't you?
Well, I'll show 'em that you just can't compare to me!

map_npcs.name: Nervous Crew
map_npcs.post_combat_dialogue: Just the other day we had someone nearly crushed by a falling boulder!
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue:
This tunnel's still under construction, tread carefully as parts may be unstable!
Take some of these, just in case...

map_npcs.name: Crew Stanley
map_npcs.post_combat_dialogue: Yep, looks like it's still stable. Just like I thought!
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue:
I knew that part of the tunnel wasn't safe, I just knew it!
Come on, let's test the integrity of this part too!

map_npcs.name: Researcher Marcus
map_npcs.post_combat_dialogue:
Oh, you're not here to collect? Well why didn't you say so?
Take some cash anyway, to keep my location our little secret...
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue:
Ah, you've come to my little corner of this tunnel.
Now, let's let not be hasty...
HA, SURPRISE BATTLE, GO!

map_npcs.name: Engineer Al
map_npcs.post_combat_dialogue: Alright, everyone back to work. Lets try to wrap up early today!
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue:
Well, this isn't gonna be easy to deal with...
Oh, welcome back {player}, we're clearing things up now, but it's a painfully slow process.
You should be safe to explore this side of the tunnel for now, just try not to get trapped again! Haha!
...
Ah, could you check in on Professor Lyra for me? 
She's not responding, maybe she misplaced her communicator?
If not that, maybe her assistant at the Hub might know what's going on.
Thanks for the help, it does not go unappreciated! {objective:Check on Proffessor Lyra}

map_npcs.name: Crew Darien
map_npcs.post_combat_dialogue:
Back to work for me...
Yup, work... Definitely not sneaking off...
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue:
Now, now, where could that researcher be? He's gonna owe me--
Oh, hey, didn't see you there. The name's Rai-
I mean the name's Darien. 
How about we have a friendly little battle?

map_npcs.name: Crew Drew
map_npcs.post_combat_dialogue: Yes, I'll get right back to work.
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue:
Yes, my title and my name are one letter off from eachother.
Yes, all of my equipment has passed inspections.
No, I don't want to battle, but I guess I will anyway.

map_npcs.name: Mr. Nice's Biggest Fan
map_npcs.post_combat_dialogue:
Well, I've kept up my end of the deal.
Now you just let me know if you run into him.
I'll believe you if you shout his secret catchphrase!
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue:
Boo!
Haha, I've always wanted to do that!
Ya see, I'm a pretty big fan of Mr. Nice!
If you see him around you *must* tell me!
Oh, you wanted to battle?
Well I suppose I can oblige!

map_npcs.name: Mr. Nice's Biggest Fan
map_npcs.pre_combat_dialogue:
Woah, so you did meet him!
What was he like?
Was he as mythical, as legendary, as manly as I believed?
I knew it!!!
Either way, I can tell you're a fan just like I am now!
Here, take this, an outfit modeled after his very own!
I hope to see you again, thank you, thank you!
